components.name: Primary Button
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #1C1917; color: #ffffff; padding: 16px 32px; border-radius: 9999px; font-weight: 600; border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: transform 0.2s; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { transform: scale(1.05); }

components.html:
Section Title

Content goes here.
components.css: .ds-card { background: #ffffff; border-radius: 1rem; padding: 2rem; border: 1px solid #E7E5E4; } .ds-card-title { font-weight: 700; color: #1C1917; margin: 0 0 0.5rem 0; } .ds-card-body { color: #78716C; margin: 0; }

narrative.overview: This system represents a clean, precise, and understated approach to data. It rejects the generic SaaS "bento box" aesthetic and the magical "AI sparkles" look. Instead, it feels like an editorial journal built by an engineer: relying on negative space, sharp typography, and thin structural borders rather than drop-shadows or gradients.
keyCharacteristics: Flat by default, shadows used exceptionally sparingly.

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: There is no traditional "brand accent color" (no blue, red, or green buttons). The system speaks purely through the contrast between the Gallery Off-White background and the Slate Ink foreground.

rules.name: The Technical Metric Rule
rules.body: Any critical number or data point should use the `Fira Code` mono font (`.font-num`) to enforce tabular alignment and signal engineered precision.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. If a container needs separation from the background, it receives a 1px border or a subtle background tint (`bg-stone-50`), never a shadow.

dos: Do rely on generous padding (e.g., `p-8` or `p-12`) to separate elements instead of lines or boxes.
Do use `Fira Code` for all dashboard numbers and metrics.
Do use `bg-[#FAFAFA]` for the main page background.
donts: Don't use the generic SaaS "Bento Box" template with repeating identical cards and generic icons.
Don't use "Apple Dark Mode" or overly moody tech styling.
Don't use "Magic" AI aesthetics like sparkles, purple/pink gradients, or glowing orbs.
Don't use light gray text on off-white backgrounds; ensure text contrast is high by sticking to `stone-500` or darker.
Don't apply shadows to standard cards or layout columns.
